text:
Gran Turismo 7 - 5 New Cars in June Update | PS5, PS4 & PS VR2 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/gran-turismo-7/

Gran Turismo 7's next free update will include four prototype racing cars and one safety car. The new content will release June 10 at 11:00pm PST / June 11 at 7:00am BST / 3:00pm JST.

New to Gran Turismo? Download My First Gran Turismo free here: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/gran-turismo-7/my-first-gran-turismo/

text:
Ravenswatch - Songs of Thieves Free Update Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10005682

IT'S AN AMBUSH! THIEVES ARE COMING TO REVERIE!

- New enemy faction: the Thieves!
- Thieves' Stashes, including Treasure rooms, Trap rooms, Cursed rooms, and Mirror rooms...
- Magical Harps and their swift Melodies...
- Stingy Jack, a new threat to your loot!
- Multiplayer Pause
- And more!

The Songs of Thieves Update is available for free PlayStation 4 and PlayStation 5 now!

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #ravenswatch

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
MLB The Show Mobile - Launch Trailer | iOS & Android
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/mlb-the-show/mlb-the-show-mobile/

Aaron Judge, Bobby Witt Jr., and Vladimir Guerrero Jr. take The Show on the go. Play like the pros and take control at the plate and on the mound, build your deck from real MLB players and legends such as Derek Jeter, Giancarlo Stanton, and Jacob deGrom, and go head-to-head with competitors worldwide in MLB The Show Mobile.

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Perceptum - Announcement Trailer | PS5 Games
Perceptum, a psychological horror game where you play as a medium investigating the disappearance of a family, comes to PlayStation 5 in 2027. 

Explore a house with an oppressive atmosphere, close your eyes to hear the beyond, use your mirror to see what should not exist and uncover the truth hidden within its walls.

#ps5 #ps5games #perceptum

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Marathon - Season 2 Developer Insights | PS5 & PC Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/

Join the dev team for a first look at the new map, Runner shell, weapons, and more coming to Season 2.

Marathon’s Open Play Week is June 2 – June 9 on PlayStation 5.

Play Now:
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/

Marathon Season 2: NIGHTFALL introduces the new zone Dire Marsh (Night), new night vision tools, a defensive Runner shell Sentinel, a new way to customize your Runner shell stats with the Cradle, faster faction progression, contract adjustments, two new weapons (KKV and D54 Battle Pistol), more experimental queues, and tons of quality-of-life updates like a bigger Vault and UI/UX improvements.

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

Explore the lost colony of Tau Ceti IV, scavenging valuable loot in a high-stakes survival first person shooter from the creators of Halo and Destiny.  
Infiltrate the dark sci-fi world of Marathon filled with rival players, enemy forces, and unpredictable dangers. Scavenge its maps alone or with a crew, then fight your way to extraction in tense, high-stakes PVP and PVE battles.

#ps5 #ps5games #pcgames #marathon

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
No Man's Sky - The Swarm Update Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/UP2034-PPSA02110_00-NOMANSSKYHG00001

A new danger has appeared in the No Man's Sky universe. Something terrible hangs in the sky: a huge, foreboding Hive-like ship, unlike anything we've seen before. It has nigh-on impenetrable defences, not least a swarm of smaller and nimbler battle drones which must be neutralised to get close enough to target its primary weapon systems, notably the biggest laser cannon our universe has ever witnessed. 

It will take a combined community effort to take it down, but the Traveller soul is fragmented into three; all three groups are competing for glory, but will also need to co-operate and strategise to take down this existential threat to the universe.

Epic and chaotic space battles await for the bravest and nimblest space pilots who dare to take on this faceless but formidable technological terror which has mysteriously appeared. Fully decked out S-Class ships assemble!

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #nomanssky

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
BrokenLore: Ascend - Coming Soon Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016943 

BrokenLore: ASCEND is a first-person psychological horror following the desperate climb of Ren and Yui, two famous Japanese rooftop climbers obsessed with pushing their limits and feeding their fame. Their pursuit for views leads them to Elysium Tower — the tallest skyscraper in Japan — for a nighttime climb meant to be their "ultimate" video.

#ps5 #ps5games #brokenlore
